member.name: T:SimpleAuth.EntityFramework.Entities.ClientEntity
member.summary: EF Core entity for a registered OAuth 2.1 client.

member.name: P:SimpleAuth.EntityFramework.Entities.ClientEntity.JwksJson
member.summary: JSON: ClientJwks? — inline JWKS for private_key_jwt.

member.name: T:SimpleAuth.EntityFramework.Entities.AuthorizationCodeEntity
member.summary: EF Core entity for an authorization code.

member.name: P:SimpleAuth.EntityFramework.Entities.AuthorizationCodeEntity.Handle
member.summary: SHA-256 hash of the opaque code handle.

member.name: P:SimpleAuth.EntityFramework.Entities.AuthorizationCodeEntity.AuthTime
member.summary: Unix timestamp of when the End-User authenticated. Set when max_age was used.

member.name: P:SimpleAuth.EntityFramework.Entities.AuthorizationCodeEntity.AcrValue
member.summary: ACR value requested via acr_values; echoed back in the ID token acr claim.

member.name: T:SimpleAuth.EntityFramework.Entities.RefreshTokenEntity
member.summary: EF Core entity for a refresh token.

member.name: T:SimpleAuth.EntityFramework.Entities.IssuedTokenEntity
member.summary: EF Core entity for an issued (reference) access token.

member.name: P:SimpleAuth.EntityFramework.Entities.IssuedTokenEntity.AuthorizationCodeHandle
member.summary: Opaque handle of the authorization code that originated this token. Used for code-reuse revocation.

member.name: T:SimpleAuth.EntityFramework.Entities.ParEntryEntity
member.summary: EF Core entity for a PAR entry (RFC 9126).

member.name: T:SimpleAuth.EntityFramework.Entities.SigningKeyEntity
member.summary: EF Core entity for a signing key.

member.name: T:SimpleAuth.EntityFramework.Entities.JtiRecordEntity
member.summary: EF Core entity tracking consumed JTIs for replay prevention.

member.name: T:SimpleAuth.EntityFramework.Entities.UserConsentEntity
member.summary: EF Core entity for stored user consent decisions.

member.name: T:SimpleAuth.EntityFramework.Entities.ScopeEntity
member.summary: EF Core entity for an API scope.

member.name: T:SimpleAuth.EntityFramework.Entities.IdentityScopeEntity
member.summary: EF Core entity for an OIDC identity scope.

member.name: T:SimpleAuth.EntityFramework.Entities.ProtectedResourceEntity
member.summary: EF Core entity for a protected resource (API).

member.name: P:SimpleAuth.EntityFramework.Entities.ProtectedResourceEntity.Scopes
member.summary: JSON: string[] — scope names belonging to this resource.

member.name: T:SimpleAuth.EntityFramework.EntityFrameworkExtensions
member.summary: Extension methods for registering the EF Core storage implementation with SimpleAuth.

member.name: M:SimpleAuth.EntityFramework.EntityFrameworkExtensions.AddSimpleAuthEntityFramework``1(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection)
member.summary: Registers all SimpleAuth stores backed by the given .
member.typeparam: Your application's , which must derive from .

member.name: M:SimpleAuth.EntityFramework.EntityFrameworkExtensions.AddSimpleAuthEntityFrameworkTransactionalStores``1(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection)
member.summary: Registers only the transactional EF Core stores — authorization codes, refresh tokens, access tokens, PAR entries, JTIs, and user consents.
member.remarks: Use this overload when clients, API scopes, and signing keys are managed separately (e.g., via server.Store.UseInMemory in AddSimpleAuth or an external Key Vault). The last-registered implementation wins in ASP.NET Core DI, so call this method after AddSimpleAuth.

member.name: M:SimpleAuth.EntityFramework.EntityFrameworkExtensions.MigrateAsync(SimpleAuth.EntityFramework.SimpleAuthDbContext,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Applies any pending migrations and optionally seeds initial data. Call this from your application startup.

member.name: T:SimpleAuth.EntityFramework.SimpleAuthDbContext
member.summary: EF Core for SimpleAuth persistence. Consumers must derive from this class (or register it directly) and configure the provider.

member.name: P:SimpleAuth.EntityFramework.SimpleAuthDbContext.SigningKeys
member.summary: Signing key records for key rotation.

member.name: T:SimpleAuth.EntityFramework.JsonConverters
member.summary: Reusable JSON value converters for entity collections.

member.name: T:SimpleAuth.EntityFramework.Stores.EfJtiStore
member.summary: EF Core implementation of . Uses a unique primary key constraint — a duplicate INSERT will throw , which is caught and interpreted as a replay.

member.name: T:SimpleAuth.EntityFramework.Stores.EfAuthorizationCodeStore
member.summary: EF Core implementation of . uses a serializable transaction to guarantee atomicity — a code can only be redeemed once even under concurrent requests.

member.name: T:SimpleAuth.EntityFramework.Stores.EfParStore
member.summary: EF Core implementation of . uses a serializable transaction for one-time-use enforcement.
